Transcript: There will be an Ohio district 11 members meeting tomorrow, January 14th at 2 p.m. It it'll be at the KC Hall 9 Hall 5 6 Walker Road McGregor At the meeting the directors will recommend ratification of a proposed contract with Windsor Raceway again tomorrow.
